title: 10 Herbal Creams For Ringworm
description: Melaleuca alternifolia creams contains compounds like cineole, limonene, and terpinen-4-ol, which have antifungal properties that help combat ringworm. These essential oils work by disrupting the fungal cell membrane, ultimately leading to the death of the fungus causing the infection. Terpinen-4-ol, in particular, has been shown to have potent antifungal activity against a wide range of fungi, including those that cause ringworm.
